## Release Notes (each ha-frontend release in this pin bump)

### 20260624.6 — 2026-07-17T14:43:34Z (stable)

- Remove custom app header text color in zha group page (@jpbede - #53101)
- Fix save button not enabling on whitespace-only entity name changes (@piitaya - #53138)
- Fix history graph editor crash on unavailable entity (@piitaya - #53141)

---

## HIGH IMPACT

No high-impact breaking changes identified in this release.

## MEDIUM IMPACT

No medium-impact degraded appearance changes identified in this release.

## LOW IMPACT

### Component: `hui-history-graph-card-editor`

**What changed:** `src/panels/lovelace/editor/config-elements/hui-history-graph-card-editor.ts` received a purely defensive TypeScript fix — `this.hass!.states[entityId]` is now typed as `HassEntity | undefined`, and the `isNumericFromAttributes` call is now guarded with a null-check on `attributes` (`const isNumeric = attributes ? isNumericFromAttributes(attributes) : false`). This prevents a crash when an entity referenced in a history graph card editor becomes unavailable.

**LCARS theme relevance:** The ha-lcars theme does not inject card-mod CSS into `hui-history-graph-card-editor` (the editor component), nor does it reference any CSS custom properties specific to it. The change has no visual effect on the rendered history graph card or its editor UI as seen through the theme's styling rules.

**Suggested fix:** No fix needed. This is a runtime crash guard with zero CSS or DOM structure impact.

---

### Component: ZHA Group Page (`zha-group-page`)

**What changed:** `src/panels/config/integrations/integration-panels/zha/zha-group-page.ts` had a custom `app-header-text-color` override removed (PR #53101: "Remove custom app header text color in zha group page"). This means the ZHA group page will now inherit `app-header-text-color` from the active theme rather than overriding it locally.

**LCARS theme relevance:** The ha-lcars theme defines `app-header-text-color: var(--lcars-ui-app-header-text-color, var(--lcars-ui-primary-text))` in `&base`. Previously the ZHA group page was overriding this with its own inline value, so the LCARS theme variable was being ignored on that page. After this change, the LCARS theme's `app-header-text-color` will now correctly apply to the ZHA group page header text, which is the desired behavior.

**Suggested fix:** No fix needed. This change makes the ZHA group page *more* theme-compliant, not less. LCARS users will now see consistent header text coloring on the ZHA group page.

---

### Component: Entity Registry Settings Editor (`entity-registry-settings-editor`)

**What changed:** `src/panels/config/entities/entity-registry-settings-editor.ts` was modified (content not included in the diff beyond the filename). Based on PR #53138 ("Fix save button not enabling on whitespace-only entity name changes"), this is a logic-only fix to the save button enable/disable state.

**LCARS theme relevance:** The ha-lcars theme applies `card-mod-config-yaml` broadly to config panels but does not inject CSS specifically targeting `entity-registry-settings-editor` or any save-button element within it. No visual properties were changed.

**Suggested fix:** No fix needed.

---

**Summary:** The `20260624.5` → `20260624.6` frontend pin bump contains no CSS variable renames, no shadow DOM structural changes, no element renames, no layout token additions, and no card background/color changes that affect any ha-lcars card-mod injection rule or CSS custom property. All three changed TypeScript files are logic/bugfix changes only. No theme source edits are required.
